reviews.review_description: Like the new map look like very og sleeping Gorilla horror but i look in the top of stump where hot chocolate should be but there's nothing look nice tho

developer_response.body: I'm sorry about that :( but this is only a temp holder game until we fully get the revamp out!

reviews.review_title: Very cool game but no players
reviews.review_description: I actually like this game but no players are there i hopy yall do a vid about the game and all the fans see this vid and download a game
Zero people online but its fun if ur reading this than play the game
This game was Kinda fun but there was no summons PLS bring back the old sleeping Gorilla horror BTW my favorite was the tornado summon but overall this a 3 in a half no players...:(
